# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Documentation

- [ ] I read the relevant COM documents.
- [ ] I updated documentation affected by this change.
- [ ] No documentation update is needed because:

## Scope

- [ ] This change is scoped to the stated problem.
- [ ] This change preserves Clada OS terminology.
- [ ] This change does not treat SolarGRANT Pro as the overall platform.

## Feature Or ADR Links

Link any relevant feature specs, ADRs, sprint docs, or research.

## Verification

List checks run:

- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Build
- [ ] Manual verification

## Risk

Describe product, technical, data, privacy, security, or operational risk.

## Release Notes

State what a reviewer or operator needs to know before release.
